race.description: Goulburn Produce Showcase Fred Cooper Cup Hcp
race.comment: ROCCO LINI (5) did a good job at Randwick and then raced forward, winning over 1800m at Wagga at this level as favourite. Is building a tidy record and can go on with the job. SAMURAI (4) was back to his best, winning a 75 over 1600m at Canberra. The gate is a touch tricky but he keeps Gibbons and can threaten with the extra fitness. CRIMSON MISS (7) ran below expectations over 1500m at Hawkesbury. Placed here prior and has weight relief. Look for her late. MISS STALWART (6) didn't have the best of it in the SAMURAI race at Canberra. Brought strong relative form to that, and she will get every chance from a low gate and with Collett staying aboard. ARISTOCRAT (9) was good at Canberra two back and will be around the mark low in the weights.
